name: Bona Fide Business Arrangement Exception

eligibility.description: Requires a written agreement that meets specific statutory tests for business purpose and arm's length comparability.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Buy-sell agreements or options to acquire property at less than fair market value are respected for valuation purposes if they are bona fide business arrangements, not a gift device, and comparable to arms-length terms.
